title: WU-14: Dashboard Full Stack
description: Dashboard stats API (GET /api/dashboard: open deals, pipeline value, tasks due today, new contacts 7d, deals by stage, recent 10 activities, 5 upcoming tasks; TTL 5min cache) + dashboard UI (4 metric cards, pipeline bar chart, my tasks widget, recent activity feed).

title: WU-13: Tags Admin Full Stack
description: Tag CRUD backend (GET all authenticated, POST/DELETE ADMIN only, cascade delete from contacts) + admin tags page frontend (list with colour swatch, name, contact count, delete with confirm, inline new tag with colour picker).

title: WU-12: Tasks Full Stack
description: Task backend (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, PATCH /complete toggle, filters by assignee/status/due) + frontend (task list with filter tabs All/My/Overdue/Today/Upcoming/Completed, optimistic toggle, task drawer, overdue/today colour coding). Redis cache-first TTL 24h.

title: WU-11: Activities Full Stack
description: Activity backend (POST/GET/DELETE, global feed, per-contact/per-deal feeds, Redis cache-first TTL 24h) + frontend (activities feed page, log-activity drawer, activity-card, type colour coding Call/Email/Meeting/Note). ActivityService frontend + backend.

title: WU-10: Deals Drag-and-Drop
description: Angular CDK drag-and-drop on Kanban board with optimistic UI. onDrop() handler: stage update, optimistic state mutation, revert on server error with toast. Column counts/values update optimistically. Tests via DragDropHarness + stub DealService.

title: WU-09: Deals Frontend (Board + Drawer)
description: Kanban board with 6 columns (280px fixed), deal cards, deal drawer (create/edit/delete with confirm), stage change via dropdown on card, activity feed tab in drawer. No drag-and-drop yet (WU-10).

title: WU-08: Deals Backend
description: Deal entity (stages: LEAD/QUALIFIED/PROPOSAL/NEGOTIATION/CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST), DealRepository, DealService with Redis cache-first, DealController (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH stage/DELETE), GET /api/deals/stats for board headers.

title: WU-07: Contacts Frontend
description: Contacts list (search, tag filter, pagination), contact detail page, contact form (create/edit), company autocomplete, tag multi-select, confirm dialog on delete. TagChip component, ContactService, CompanyService.

title: WU-06: Contacts + Companies Backend
description: Contact and Company domain: entities, repos, services, controllers, DTOs, Redis cache-first reads (TTL 24h), hard delete cascade (contact + linked activities, clear task contact refs), search/pagination, Tag entity. GET /api/companies read-only.

title: WU-05: Frontend Auth + Admin Users UI + Profile
description: Login page, AuthService, user profile page (/profile), admin users management page (/users). JWT in localStorage, login/logout flow, admin can invite/deactivate/change-role users.

title: WU-04: Backend Auth
description: User entity, real UserDetailsService replacing WU-02 stub, auth endpoints (POST /api/auth/login), user management endpoints (GET/POST/PATCH /api/users), V2 seed migration for admin user. JWT 8h expiry, BCrypt, roles USER/ADMIN.

title: WU-03: Frontend Project Scaffold
description: Angular 20 project scaffold with app shell, 240px dark sidebar, all design tokens in styles.css, shared components (toast/confirm-dialog/skeleton/avatar/button), auth interceptor, error interceptor, auth guard, admin guard, toast service. Foundation all frontend feature WUs depend on.

title: WU-02: Backend Project Scaffold
description: Spring Boot 3.3.x skeleton with JWT infrastructure (stub UserDetailsService), Redis config, CORS config, global error handling, and V1 Flyway migration creating ALL domain tables. This is the foundation all backend domain WUs depend on.
